visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins in an animated style with a bald male character standing in front of a blue background. He is positioned in the center, speaking with expressive facial movements. To his left is a shelf with three small, stylized character figurines. Above him, a white sign with black text hangs. (2) The scene transitions to a technical demonstration where graphics representing a computer monitor with 'DATA' and a clock with 'TIME' appear against a dotted background. The character's hands are seen gesturing towards these icons. (3) A highly detailed itinerary sheet is shown, featuring checkboxes, icons for cake and coffee, and hand-drawn maps, presented as a professional document. (4) The character is seen in a state of emotional ecstasy, with tears in his eyes and a glowing background, holding the itinerary like a sacred text. (5) He is then shown wearing a blue patterned beret, working intently at a computer. (6) A framed picture of a 'Kyoto' travel itinerary is displayed as if it were a masterpiece in a museum, with architectural elements of a Japanese shrine visible within the frame. (7) A new character with a mustache and glasses, wearing a suit, holds up a 'PICK ME' sign, looking amazed. (8) The scene shifts to the main character and another male character with black hair (the 'P' person) walking through a red torii gate in a park-like setting. (9) Close-up shots of diverse animated characters' faces appear as they offer praise, indicated by dynamic background lines. (10) The 'Jolly-high' title card appears with vibrant yellow and orange sunburst effects. (11) The two characters are shown in various travel scenarios: eating at a restaurant table, walking in the woods, and relaxing indoors. (12) The video concludes with the main character looking frustrated and shouting at the other character, who looks indifferent.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: 阿啾小劇場. [Slogan]: J人的夢想是把行程表放進美術館展覽. [Slogan]: 完整影片在Youtube. [Subtitle]: 我個人很喜歡排行程. (2) [Subtitle]: 每次行程的SOP就是. (3) [Variety]: DATA. [Variety]: TIME. [Subtitle]: 查資料 查時間. (4) [Subtitle]: 最後排版裝飾. (5) [Subtitle]: 並配上美美的圖片示意圖. (6) [Subtitle]: 啊 Artist!. (7) [Subtitle]: 把衣服穿上. (8) [Subtitle]: 對J人的me來說. (9) [Subtitle]: 做行程就是像在做藝術作品一樣. (10) [Subtitle]: 每一次的行程 都是以能放進博物館的等級在製作的. (11) [Variety]: PICK ME. [Subtitle]: 這個京都行程我出三百萬. (12) [Subtitle]: 到底是在供三百萬小碗糕. (13) [Subtitle]: 沒錯 除了喜歡排定出遊的行程之外. (14) [Subtitle]: 最能讓我感到成就感的 就是獲得團員們的讚賞. (15) [Subtitle]: 阿啾好棒好厲害. (16) [Subtitle]: 阿啾真的是沒你不行耶. (17) [Subtitle]: 阿啾好棒喔但禿頭. (18) [Subtitle]: 什麼鬼. (19) [Subtitle]: 沒錯 我的J. (20) [Variety]: Jolly-high. [Subtitle]: 就是Jolly-high. (21) [Subtitle]: 什麼意思. (22) [Subtitle]: 阿啾你真的是. (23) [Subtitle]: 不要瞎掰好嗎. (24) [Subtitle]: 而學長 則是P人. (25) [Subtitle]: 出國就是無腦跟著走. (26) [Subtitle]: 不會有任何抱怨. (27) [Subtitle]: 也不會有任何意見. (28) [Subtitle]: 學長 我們等一下去吃日式料理好不好. (29) [Subtitle]: 好啊. (30) [Subtitle]: 欸學長 我們明天要五點起床搭車喔. (31) [Subtitle]: 好. (32) [Subtitle]: 學長 等等行程是泡裸湯喔. (33) [Subtitle]: 欸 我不要. (34) [Variety]: 恐怖情人. [Subtitle]: 恐怖情人. (35) [Subtitle]: 沒錯 因此我跟學長出國. (36) [Subtitle]: 都是我排行程 他無腦跟著走. (37) [Subtitle]: 基本上都沒啥吵架. (38) [Subtitle]: 是嗎. (39) [Subtitle]: 想吵架嗎.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main bald character, 1 supporting black-haired male character, plus several secondary animated heads for reactions.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One bald male character in a black t-shirt; one male character with black hair and a reddish-brown t-shirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Varies between a minimalist studio setting with a blue wall, abstract graphic backgrounds with patterns, and stylized Japanese-themed outdoor locations including a shrine with a torii gate.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio starts with a high-tempo, upbeat electronic synth track. The main narrator's voice is clear, bright, and energetic, delivering dialogue with a fast speech rate. (2) A sharp 'whoosh' sound effect punctuates the transition to the graphic sequence. (3) A chime or 'ding' sound effect coincides with the appearance of the text 'DATA' and 'TIME'. (4) The narrator's tone shifts to an exaggerated, almost operatic pitch as he shouts 'Artist!', accompanied by a swelling orchestral sting. (5) A percussive 'hit' sound marks the shift to the beret-wearing scene, while the background music maintains its steady pulse. (6) A comedic 'boing' or cartoon impact sound occurs when the rich character appears. (7) During the 'compliment' montage, several short, overlapping vocal clips of praise are heard in quick succession, layered over the music. (8) A louder impact sound effect introduces the 'Jolly-high' title card. (9) The audio then features a back-and-forth dialogue between two male voices; one is persuasive and slightly neurotic, while the other is calm, low-pitched, and monosyllabic. (10) A dramatic 'riser' effect leads to the final punchline where the narrator's voice becomes strained and high-arousal, followed by a sudden hard cut to silence.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Intro -> Definition of 'J' trait -> Elaborate SOP -> Peer Reaction -> Comparison with 'P' trait -> Specific Travel Examples -> Comedic Conclusion.
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To humorously illustrate and compare the personality types 'J' (planner) and 'P' (spontaneous) based on the MBTI framework, specifically within the context of planning and executing a travel itinerary.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A fast-paced animated short typical of social media trends, using relatable personality tropes (MBTI) to drive engagement.
